The provided scene excerpt for Temple (fileID 259640721) contains only GameObject and Transform components; no Collider, EventTrigger, or MonoBehaviour (no m_Calls) are present. Has_Rigidbody is False, so Grab/Transform are not applicable. To define a valid trigger, please provide the MonoBehaviour components (including any UnityEvent m_Calls), or confirm any Collider/EventTrigger on Temple or its children so we can trigger public no-arg methods accordingly.

Child of Temple. PrefabInstance id=1781955274 has a Collider (BoxCollider size overridden), Has_Rigidbody=False. MonoBehaviour id=1602679153 (m_Script guid=39f8a5a2b11c2426cb2a2bea3e825751) corresponds to script Door with public no-arg methods Open/Close/Unlock and AudioClip fields set via scene meta. Initial state: locked=true, _state=Closed. Trigger Door.Open to cover fail path and PlaySound(open_fail_sound).
Unlock door so subsequent Open transitions to Opening. This covers Door.Unlock().

With locked=false and _state=Closed, trigger Door.Open to start Opening. Wait ~3.6s (speed=2.0, offset=7.0) to allow Update to slide to fully Opened and cover Opening->Opened transition with PlaySound(open_success_sound).

From Opened state, trigger Door.Close to cover Closing path and Update's Closing movement back toward initial position, including PlaySound(open_success_sound). Wait ~3.6s to exercise the full Closing branch.

Crystal (PrefabInstance id=595963424) has MonoBehaviour id=791898217 (m_Script guid=7ec1f4a241dbe3243aed64a4afbc8b66) which matches the provided Crystal script. Start() disables its MeshCollider, so enable clickability first via MakeClickable() to allow the EventTrigger to function. EventTrigger component id=791898216 (guid=d0b148fe25e99eb48b9724523833bab1) exists; MeshCollider id=791898213 is present.

Simulate the EventTrigger m_Delegates (eventID=4) persistent call which invokes Crystal.Touch on MonoBehaviour 791898217. This covers audio playback, sets _hide_dialog=false and _touched=true; after audio finishes, speechBubble Canvas (fileID=594625909) becomes enabled per Update().

Invoke TakeCoins() on MonoBehaviour 791898217 to exercise dialog switching: hides dialog_hi (fileID=343541951) and shows dialog_teleport if no objects tagged 'Coin' exist; otherwise shows dialog_fail (fileID=2058198330). To cover both branches, provide the runtime coin count or a way to remove all coins.

Call Teleport() on MonoBehaviour 791898217 to set _audio.clip=teleport_sound (guid=5d3186b95a5aaef4b87b7f3d2a4de69a), play it, and set _teleporting=true. Update() will vibrate while playing and, when finished, activate dialog_end (fileID=805090090) and clear _teleporting.
Call Restart() on MonoBehaviour 791898217 to exercise the SceneManager.LoadScene(0) path. Place last as it reloads the scene.
